resolved_identity: BTH_RS00455 = old_locus_tag BTH_II0090, Burkholderia thailandensis E264, annotated 'DUF3274 domain-containing protein' (NC_007650.1/chr II). Not a peptidoglycan amidase effector.
notes: Locus resolves to BTH_II0090 (DUF3274 protein) but is NOT named in the current_doi (Russell et al. 2012, PMC3358704); not among that paper's named T6SS-1 substrates. No experimental T6SS-effector support. Unsupported/unidentifiable.

verbatim_quote: Structure-based algorithms predict extensive structural similarity between two of the proteins, BTH_II0310 and BTH_I2691, and bacteriocins LlpA and colicin Ia, respectively
resolved_identity: BTH_RS25940 = old_locus_tag BTH_I2691, B. thailandensis E264, 'T6SS effector BTH_I2691 family protein' (NC_007651.1/chr I); colicin Ia-like putative T6SS-1 substrate.
notes: current_doi verified (Russell et al. 2012, Cell Host Microbe, PMC3358704). BTH_I2691 named as one of the 11 proteins requiring T6SS-1 for export. Not individually biochemically characterized but named verbatim. prior_audit 'unidentifiable_row' incorrect: locus identifiable + supported.

resolved_identity: BTH_RS28610 = old_locus_tag BTH_I3226, B. thailandensis E264, annotated 'DUF3274 domain-containing protein' (NC_007651.1/chr I). Not a peptidoglycan amidase effector.
notes: Locus resolves to BTH_I3226 (DUF3274 protein), NOT named in current_doi (Russell et al. 2012, PMC3358704); not among named T6SS-1 substrates. No primary paper found. Unsupported/unidentifiable.
